title: ConvSearch-R1: Self-Driven Conversational Query Reformulation with Retrieval-Guided Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: ConvSearch-R1
defines.definition: A self-driven conversational query reformulation framework that learns rewrites directly from retrieval feedback without external rewrite supervision.

problem: Existing conversational query reformulation methods depend heavily on costly external rewrite supervision and are poorly aligned with downstream retrievers.
